title: cyclobalanopsis dulongensis
intro: Cyclobalanopsis dulongensis, also known as Dulong chestnut or Dulong oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae, native to Yunnan province in China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis dulongensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the bark of this plant is often prepared into a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create herbal remedies.
